name: Out POP
description: The Out POP outputs data to POPs outside its parent component. For each Out POP inside a component, there is one output connector added to the Out POP's parent component. You can wire a POP to its input, or reference another POP with the Select POP parameter. By putting a string in the Label parameter, when you roll your cursor over the parent component's output, it will display the label.

parameters.name: Select POP
parameters.label: Select POP
parameters.description: POP reference to output when no input is connected.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.label: Label
parameters.description: Creates a pop-up label when the cursor rolls over this Component output.

parameters.name: Connect Order
parameters.label: Connect Order
parameters.description: All the connect orders from the Out OPs are sorted to determine the order of the connectors on the parent COMP.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Out_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
